name: Vanderbilt University
meets_full_need_notes: Vanderbilt meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic undergraduates. Vanderbilt also offers significant merit aid.
no_loan_notes: Vanderbilt does not have a blanket no-loan policy. Loans may be included in need-based aid packages. However, Opportunity Vanderbilt replaced loans with grants for lower-income students.

merit_thresholds.notes: Vanderbilt offers full-tuition merit scholarships including the Cornelius Vanderbilt Scholarship, Ingram Scholarship, and Chancellor's Scholarship. These are highly competitive and require separate applications.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD. Merit scholarship finalists are identified in the ED round. ED is binding.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal aid packages through the Office of Student Financial Aid with documentation of changed circumstances or special situations.
